statusLine.command: input=$(cat); dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); [ -n "$remaining" ] && printf '%s | %s | Context: %.1f%% remaining' "$(basename "$dir")" "$model" "$remaining" || printf '%s | %s' "$(basename "$dir")" "$model"
